title: WebAssembly at the Edge: Serverless with WASM
author: Avery Kim
Edge Computing Specialist
description: Deploy WASM modules to edge locations for ultra-low latency—but cold starts persist
content:
WebAssembly enables near-native performance at edge locations with fast startup times.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Edge Cascade (2037)](/docs/articles/edge-cascade-2037)
